title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq lose steam as Wall Street juggles tariffs, earnings, and inflation Wall Street digested a surprisingly cool wholesale inflation reading and more big bank earnings, with one eye on Trump's latest tariff moves.
Trending tickers: ASML, MP Materials, Barclays, Renault and AstraZeneca The latest investor updates on stocks that are trending on Wednesday.

Wall Street and FTSE slip as traders weigh up ongoing tariff turmoil and UK inflation data Food prices rose at a rate of 4.5% and transport prices rose by 1.7% in the 12 months to June, up from 0.7% in May.
Pound rises after UK inflation blow Sterling rose after an unexpected jump in UK inflation, suggesting that the Bank of England is going to struggle to justify an interest rate cut next month.
